idea: EV Charger Density Surge in Sunbelt States

data.source: OpenChargeMap API for daily EV charger count changes in TX, FL, AZ, NV regions

behavior: Rapid expansion of EV charging infrastructure signals accelerating capital deployment and grid stress in high-growth regions, often preceding utility rate pressure and industrial construction demand.

market_impact.rationale: Infrastructure buildout drives industrial demand for construction, electrical equipment, and smart grid technology.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly charger additions exceed 200-unit threshold in any tracked Sunbelt metro, enter long
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if weekly additions drop below 100 units

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charger deployment accelerates seasonally in Q1 and Q2; regional clusters frequently hit thresholds as utilities and private firms push infrastructure rollout.

idea: Natural Gas Storage Draw Reversal Signal

data.source: FRED series IMNRNSA (US EIA natural gas storage) weekly readings

behavior: Unexpected reversal from net storage draws to net builds signals demand destruction or supply shock, triggering rapid utility and commodity sector repricing.

market_impact.rationale: Reversal in gas storage trends signals weakening energy demand, refinery utilization pressure, and margin compression.

trade_logic.entry: If 4-week moving average of storage draws flips from negative to positive, short XLE
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if 4-week MA reverses back negative

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Storage injection/withdrawal cycles flip seasonally and during demand shocks; reversals occur multiple times annually in response to weather and economic cycles.

idea: Google Trends Surge in 'Pest Control Failure' Searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly interest for 'cockroach infestation', 'bed bug removal', 'rat exterminator' in major metros via google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in pest control search interest signal housing stock deterioration, seasonal humidity/warmth events, or urban sanitation breakdown—all leading indicators of local property stress and rental market weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Pest control search surges correlate with deferred maintenance, rental unit degradation, and downward property value pressure.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search index for any major metro exceeds 150% of 52-week median, short XLRE
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if search index falls back below 110% of median

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal temperature swings and humidity cycles trigger pest searches monthly; urban deterioration and seasonal transitions ensure regular threshold breaches.

idea: Hospital Admission Surge Detection via Google Trends

data.source: Google Trends weekly interest for 'emergency room wait time', 'hospital admission process', 'urgent care near me' via google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in hospital/ER search interest signal acute health crisis events (seasonal flu, contamination events, heatwaves) that precede healthcare utilization surges and pharmaceutical demand.

market_impact.rationale: Hospital admission spikes drive emergency pharmaceutical demand, clinical supplies, and diagnostic testing—all benefiting healthcare sector.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search index exceeds 130% of 52-week median across 3+ major metros, go long XLV
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if search index normalized to <110% of median

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal illness cycles, heatwave events, and contamination incidents trigger hospital search spikes multiple times per year, especially during winter and summer peaks.

data.source: Google Trends weekly interest for 'heavy equipment rental', 'excavator rental', 'crane rental' via google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in construction equipment rental searches signal acceleration in commercial/residential development permitting and project starts, leading infrastructure and materials demand.

market_impact.rationale: Equipment rental surge precedes capital spending in construction, cement demand, and industrial equipment manufacturing.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search index exceeds 125% of 13-week moving average, go long XLI
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if index falls to 105% of moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal construction cycles, permit issuance waves, and weather-driven project starts ensure equipment rental searches spike multiple times per quarter.

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature extremes (>95F or <20F) + Google Trends weekly 'air conditioner repair', 'furnace repair' searches via google_trends adapter

behavior: Extreme temperature events combined with HVAC repair search surges signal replacement cycle acceleration, driving demand for electrical equipment, installation labor, and utility infrastructure upgrades.

market_impact.rationale: HVAC replacement drives electrical grid demand, utility capex, and peak demand pricing pressure.

trade_logic.entry: If temperature extreme occurs + weekly HVAC search index >140% of median within same week, go long XLU
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if search index normalizes and temperatures moderate

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Extreme heat/cold events occur seasonally; winter and summer temperature swings reliably trigger HVAC repair searches multiple times per year.

idea: Small Package Delivery RSS Volume Surge

data.source: RSS feed count for 'UPS delivery delay', 'FedEx package delay', 'Amazon logistics slowdown' via rss_count adapter

behavior: Sustained RSS mention spikes for delivery delays signal capacity constraints, labor shortages, or seasonal volume compression in parcel logistics, pressuring shipping and retail margins.

market_impact.rationale: Delivery delays reduce consumer satisfaction, compress retail margins, and signal e-commerce logistics stress.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS count for delivery delay articles exceeds 15 for 3 consecutive days, short XLY
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if daily RSS count falls below 8 for 5 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Holiday shopping, seasonal weather events, and labor staffing issues trigger delivery delay articles regularly; RSS spikes occur every few weeks during peak seasons.

data.source: RSS feed count for 'technology company layoff announcement', 'tech sector hiring freeze', 'software engineer severance' via rss_count adapter

behavior: Spikes in tech layoff announcement frequency signal macro weakness, margin compression, and capital allocation collapse—driving sector rotation away from high-growth tech toward value.

market_impact.rationale: Tech layoff waves precede earnings misses, valuation compression, and reduced enterprise IT spending.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS count for layoff announcements exceeds 12 for 2 consecutive days, short XLK
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if daily RSS count remains below 6 for 10 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Tech sector earnings cycles, macro recessions, and strategic restructuring announcements generate layoff news regularly; thresholds breach multiple times per quarter.

data.source: RSS feed count for 'restaurant chain opening', 'new restaurant location announcement', 'restaurant franchise expansion' via rss_count adapter

behavior: Clusters of restaurant expansion announcements signal optimistic consumer outlook, real estate availability, and labor market confidence—bullish signals for consumer discretionary and hospitality.

market_impact.rationale: Restaurant expansion waves signal consumer confidence, foot traffic expectations, and real estate market health.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS count for restaurant expansion announcements exceeds 10 for 3 consecutive days, go long XLY
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if daily RSS count falls below 6 for 5 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Quarterly earnings announcements and franchise disclosure documents release expansion plans in clusters; seasonal tourism and holiday planning drive announcement waves regularly.

data.source: RSS feed count for 'airline fuel surcharge', 'airline ticket price increase fuel', 'carrier surcharge announcement' via rss_count adapter

behavior: Spikes in airline surcharge announcements signal crude oil pressure and margin compression in carriers, triggering flight capacity cuts and reduced travel demand—bearish for discretionary travel and hospitality.

market_impact.rationale: Fuel surcharge announcements signal rising operational costs, capacity constraint, and reduced pricing power—reducing leisure travel demand.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS count for surcharge announcements exceeds 8 for 2 consecutive days, short XLY
trade_logic.exit: After 2 weeks or if daily count falls below 4 for 7 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Oil price volatility and quarterly fare review cycles trigger surcharge announcement waves multiple times per year; seasonal travel demand spikes force pricing announcement clusters.
